tagline: Stop worrying about septic backups, cesspool odors, and contaminated water threatening your family's safety.

hero.headline: 60+ Years Protecting Long Island Families
hero.subheadline: Since 1960, Clear River Environmental has been the trusted name for septic, cesspool, and environmental services across Long Island. Family-owned, EPA-certified, and available 24/7 when you need us most.

services.headline: Complete Environmental Services
services.subtitle: From routine cesspool maintenance to emergency hazardous waste remediation — one call handles it all.

cards.title: Cesspool Services
cards.description: Cesspool pumping, location, aeration, and treatments to keep your system running efficiently and prevent costly backups.

cards.title: Septic Tank Services
cards.description: Full septic tank installation, repair, pumping, and inspection services for residential and commercial properties across Long Island.

cards.title: Plumbing Services
cards.description: Residential and commercial plumbing including emergency repairs, ensuring your home's water systems function properly year-round.

cards.title: Sewer & Drain Cleaning
cards.description: Professional sewer and drain cleaning using high-pressure water jetting and video camera inspection technology to pinpoint problems fast.

cards.title: Hazardous Waste Remediation
cards.description: Certified hazardous and non-hazardous waste remediation, oil tank cleaning, and emergency oil spill response by licensed technicians.

cards.title: Bulk Liquid Waste Hauling
cards.description: Safe and fully compliant bulk liquid waste hauling services for residential, commercial, and industrial clients throughout the region.

steps.title: Call or Book Online
steps.description: Reach us 24/7. Describe your issue and we'll schedule a convenient time — or dispatch immediately for emergencies.

steps.title: Expert Diagnosis
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive with advanced equipment, diagnose the problem accurately, and explain your options clearly — no surprises.

steps.title: Problem Solved
steps.description: We complete the work efficiently, clean up thoroughly, and ensure your system is running safely before we leave.

about.label: About Clear River Environmental
about.headline: Three Generations of Environmental Expertise
about.description: Since 1960, Clear River Environmental has been a family-owned company dedicated to protecting Long Island homes and businesses. What started as a local cesspool service has grown into a comprehensive environmental solutions provider — all while keeping the same honest, personal service our neighbors have trusted for over six decades.

features.title: EPA & IICRC Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician on your job holds EPA and IICRC certifications, ensuring work is done safely and to the highest environmental standards.

features.title: Comprehensive Environmental Services
features.description: From routine cesspool pumping to emergency hazardous waste remediation, we handle it all — one trusted company for every need.

features.title: 60+ Years of Community Trust
features.description: Three generations of Long Island families have relied on us. We earn your trust every single visit, just like we have since 1960.

pricing.headline: Transparent, Fair Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. We provide upfront quotes before any work begins so you know exactly what to expect.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. With 60+ years of reputation on the line, your trust means everything to us.

faqs.question: How often should I pump my cesspool or septic tank?
faqs.answer: For most Long Island homes, we recommend pumping every 2-3 years. However, household size, water usage, and system age can affect this timeline. We'll assess your specific situation and recommend the right schedule.

faqs.question: Do you offer 24/7 emergency service?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Septic emergencies don't wait for business hours, and neither do we. Call us any time — day or night, weekends and holidays included — and we'll dispatch a technician immediately.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Long Island including Suffolk County communities like Ronkonkoma, Brentwood, Islip, Smithtown, and surrounding areas. If you're on Long Island, we can help.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team holds EPA, IICRC, and CRA certifications. Every technician is a licensed environmental service professional with extensive training and experience.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: For emergencies like cesspool collapses or sewage backups, we typically arrive within hours — not days. We've even completed full septic system replacements in under 24 hours when needed.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: Izzy is extremely knowledgeable and very polite. We are always glad to see him year after year.

testimonials.name: Emergency Septic Customer
testimonials.text: Our cesspool collapsed and in less than 24 hours we had a new septic system. Some of the most skilled professionals with extremely fair pricing and service second to none.

testimonials.name: Residential Customer
testimonials.text: Clear River installed our septic system and services it. Their prices are fair and service is very professional.

contact.subtitle: Whether it's routine maintenance or a midnight emergency, we're here for you.
benefits: Free phone consultations and upfront quotes
